scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.setup: corepack enable && corepack pnpm install && corepack pnpm run db:push && corepack pnpm run seed
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build && rm -rf artifacts/api-server/public/assets && cp -r artifacts/godsview-dashboard/dist/public/. artifacts/api-server/public
scripts.clean:generated: git restore artifacts/api-server/dist artifacts/api-server/public/index.html artifacts/api-server/public/assets && git clean -fd artifacts/api-server/public/assets
scripts.clean:runtime: rm -rf artifacts/api-server/.runtime && rm -f execution_autonomy_guard_state*.json execution_incident_guard_state*.json execution_market_guard_state*.json execution_idempotency_state*.json artifacts/api-server/execution_autonomy_guard_state*.json artifacts/api-server/execution_incident_guard_state*.json artifacts/api-server/execution_market_guard_state*.json artifacts/api-server/execution_idempotency_state*.json
scripts.verify:cleanup: corepack pnpm run clean:generated && corepack pnpm run clean:runtime
scripts.verify:prod: sh -c 'status=0; corepack pnpm run typecheck && GODSVIEW_DATA_DIR=artifacts/api-server/.runtime corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test && corepack pnpm run build || status=$?; corepack pnpm run verify:cleanup || true; exit $status'
scripts.verify:release: sh -c 'status=0; corepack pnpm run typecheck && GODSVIEW_DATA_DIR=artifacts/api-server/.runtime corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test && corepack pnpm run build && GODSVIEW_DATA_DIR=artifacts/api-server/.runtime START_SERVER_LOCAL=1 REQUIRE_HTTP=1 DEPLOY_READINESS_EXPECT_SYSTEM_MODE=paper DEPLOY_READINESS_MIN_STATUS=DEGRADED RUN_BUILD_CHECKS=0 RUN_SMOKE_TESTS=0 INCLUDE_PREFLIGHT=0 corepack pnpm run deploy:readiness || status=$?; corepack pnpm run verify:cleanup || true; exit $status'
scripts.verify:market:paper: sh -c 'status=0; corepack pnpm run typecheck && GODSVIEW_DATA_DIR=artifacts/api-server/.runtime corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test && corepack pnpm run build && GODSVIEW_DATA_DIR=artifacts/api-server/.runtime START_SERVER_LOCAL=1 REQUIRE_HTTP=1 DEPLOY_READINESS_EXPECT_SYSTEM_MODE=paper DEPLOY_READINESS_MIN_STATUS=DEGRADED RUN_BUILD_CHECKS=0 RUN_SMOKE_TESTS=0 INCLUDE_PREFLIGHT=1 corepack pnpm run deploy:readiness || status=$?; corepack pnpm run verify:cleanup || true; exit $status'
scripts.verify:market:live: sh -c 'status=0; corepack pnpm run typecheck && GODSVIEW_DATA_DIR=artifacts/api-server/.runtime corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test && corepack pnpm run build && GODSVIEW_DATA_DIR=artifacts/api-server/.runtime ALPACA_API_KEY=${ALPACA_API_KEY:-PK_LIVE_READINESS_PLACEHOLDER} ALPACA_SECRET_KEY=${ALPACA_SECRET_KEY:-LIVE_SECRET_READINESS_PLACEHOLDER} GODSVIEW_OPERATOR_TOKEN=${GODSVIEW_OPERATOR_TOKEN:-LIVE_OPERATOR_TOKEN_READINESS_PLACEHOLDER} START_SERVER_LOCAL=1 REQUIRE_HTTP=1 DEPLOY_READINESS_EXPECT_SYSTEM_MODE=live_enabled DEPLOY_READINESS_MIN_STATUS=${DEPLOY_READINESS_MIN_STATUS:-DEGRADED} RUN_BUILD_CHECKS=0 RUN_SMOKE_TESTS=0 INCLUDE_PREFLIGHT=1 corepack pnpm run deploy:readiness || status=$?; corepack pnpm run verify:cleanup || true; exit $status'
scripts.verify:market:live:strict: sh -c 'status=0; corepack pnpm run typecheck && GODSVIEW_DATA_DIR=artifacts/api-server/.runtime corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test && corepack pnpm run build && GODSVIEW_DATA_DIR=artifacts/api-server/.runtime ALPACA_API_KEY=${ALPACA_API_KEY:?ALPACA_API_KEY is required} ALPACA_SECRET_KEY=${ALPACA_SECRET_KEY:?ALPACA_SECRET_KEY is required} GODSVIEW_OPERATOR_TOKEN=${GODSVIEW_OPERATOR_TOKEN:?GODSVIEW_OPERATOR_TOKEN is required} START_SERVER_LOCAL=1 REQUIRE_HTTP=1 DEPLOY_READINESS_EXPECT_SYSTEM_MODE=live_enabled DEPLOY_READINESS_MIN_STATUS=READY RUN_BUILD_CHECKS=0 RUN_SMOKE_TESTS=0 INCLUDE_PREFLIGHT=1 corepack pnpm run deploy:readiness || status=$?; corepack pnpm run verify:cleanup || true; exit $status'
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
